title.en: Ye Tian was pleasantly surprised, this news was...

content.en:
"The Immortal Golden Pill has been practiced!"

Ye Tian was pleasantly surprised, this news was too exciting.

Once the 17 Immortal Golden Pills were in hand, he could move on to the next step.

Not long after, the Dark Lord came back and handed over the 17 jade bottles containing the 17 Immortal Golden Pills to Ye Tian.

"Dark Master, how is the matter of the Blue Water Realm?"

Ye Tian asked.

He had asked the Dark Lord to deal with the matter of the Blue Water Realm before, and let the Dark Lord negotiate with the Divine Blade Alliance to let him enter the Blue Water Realm to cultivate.

Because there are thousands of weak water and thousands of heavy water in the blue water realm at the same time, it is the most perfect cultivation place, which can completely allow him to practice to the fourth level of the Tianyuan True Law realm.

However, the value of a thousand weak water and a thousand heavy water is very huge, even a galaxy-level power wants to obtain a thousand weak water and a thousand heavy water, so the Divine Blade Alliance has a very strict control over the blue water realm, and it is easy to prevent outsiders from entering the blue water realm, lest outsiders steal some rare water treasures such as a thousand weak water and a thousand heavy water.

Ordinary people want to enter the blue water realm, but there is absolutely no hope.

However, although the Divine Blade Alliance is one of the nine supreme-level forces, the composition and management of the Divine Blade Alliance are completely different from other supreme-level forces, this is a completely loose supreme-level force, without much constraint, and on the premise of equivalent transactions, many scattered cultivators who are unwilling to join other supreme-level forces will choose to join the Divine Blade Alliance.

And the Divine Blade Alliance will also issue tasks for members of the Divine Blade Alliance to do, and once they complete the task, they will receive amazing rewards.

The Divine Blade Alliance is similar to the former Scattered Cultivation Alliance on Earth, but the grade is countless times higher.

It is precisely because the management is not strict and the level trading is the premise, so as long as he pays a certain price, he can still enter the blue water realm.

This time, the Lord of Darkness negotiated with the high-level of the Divine Blade Alliance, which manages the Blue Water Realm.

"Your Highness, I talked to the Golden Sword Master of the Divine Blade Alliance, and after some discussion, the Divine Blade Alliance can allow His Highness to enter the Blue Water Realm, but there are two conditions. The first condition is that His Highness is not allowed to take any treasures from the Blue Water Realm, and he needs to make an oath, and the second condition is that His Highness will give him a place to enter the Six Realms of Reincarnation Pagoda. In addition, His Royal Highness also needs to pay a fee of 1 million divine crystals, this fee is the cost of entering the Blue Water Realm, even if it is a member of the Divine Blade Alliance, entering the Blue Water Realm also needs to pay this fee, after all, the Divine Blade Alliance paid a huge price when it built the Blue Water Realm. "

The Dark Lord spoke.

"Yes, I agreed!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Although the first condition is to swear, this is very normal, and the Divine Blade Alliance is also worried that the person who enters will secretly take away some water-based treasures, such as Thousand Heavy Weak Water and Thousand Heavy Water, if you take some out, the loss of the Divine Blade Alliance will be too great.

So, swearing is necessary.

As for the second condition, it is nothing, the Six Paths Reincarnation Tower is a supreme treasure, if you want to use the Six Paths Reincarnation Tower to reincarnate and practice, even within the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, it is difficult to have this opportunity, although the Divine Blade Alliance is a supreme-level force, but there is no way to have a place.

And the Six Realms of Reincarnation Tower was brought back by Ye Tian, he has a certain amount of authority, and giving the Divine Blade Alliance a place is naturally a very simple matter, and the Supreme Hall of the Human Race will not refuse.

In short, these two conditions were not difficult for Ye Tian, and he naturally would not refuse.

Then, the Dark Lord went to restore the Blade Alliance.

The Divine Blade Alliance promised to allow Ye Tian to enter the Blue Water Realm to cultivate at any time, and there was no time limit.

this day.

Ye Tian, under the leadership of the Dark Master, came to the Divine Blade Alliance, completed the transaction between the two sides, and then took a voucher given by the Divine Blade Alliance to the Blue Water Realm.

The Blue Water Realm is located in the same river system as the Divine Blade Alliance, on a galaxy.

The galaxy is a river that runs through the starry sky in the universe, which is relatively common, but the space around the galaxy is unstable, and ordinary god-level people do not dare to approach the galaxy, otherwise it is easy to be swallowed by the galaxy.

And the power of water in the galaxy is very terrifying, the god level will be crushed into slag if you are not careful, and if the ordinary god level is swallowed by the galaxy, it will be dead.

Ye Tian was not afraid of the galaxy, and came to the galaxy where the blue water realm was located, and immediately stepped into the galaxy.

Thundered!!!

The surging water of the galaxy stirred the starry sky, bringing a certain amount of pressure to Ye Tian, but he resisted this pressure with his own strength.

On top of this galaxy is a huge altar, and above the altar is the passage to the blue water realm.

Around the altar, many fortresses were built, among which a large number of Divine Blade Alliance powerhouses were stationed, and even a master was stationed here to prevent the Blue Water Realm from being invaded by foreign enemies.

Ye Tian came here, took out the voucher, and successfully entered the altar.

Immediately, a galaxy-level powerhouse opened a passage for Ye Tian.

"Your Highness Wanfa, you can take this voucher, once you want to come out of the blue water realm, you can activate the voucher. "

The galaxy-level powerhouse reminded.

"Understood!"

Ye Tian put away the voucher and entered the space passage.

......

Blue Water Realm.

Ye Tian stood on a large ground and looked at the situation around him.

It was a little different from what he had expected, except for the aura of water in the air, it was no different from the ordinary world.

He thought it was full of water, but now he seemed to be wrong.

"That's right, if it's all water, wouldn't the various water system cultivation places be chaotic together?"

Ye Tian smiled.

Next, Ye Tian began to look for the Thousand Weak Water and the Thousand Heavy Water Land that he needed.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to discover a cultivation treasure land, but it was not a place of a thousand weak waters and a thousand heavy waters, but a cultivation treasure land containing unimaginable water vitality, if you cultivated here, the cultivation speed of water system cultivators was dozens or even hundreds of times that of the outside world.

Ye Tian kept flying, and found a place of water system treasures, but none of them were the places he wanted.

Half a day later.

Ye Tian came to a small lake, he sensed it, and was immediately pleasantly surprised.

"The power of weak water is ......"

Ye Tian probed for a moment, and as soon as his hand touched the lake, it corroded his hand almost instantly, and a force pulled him into the bottom of the lake.

Weak water has terrible corrosive power, and once it sinks into weak water, it is difficult to float up.

The weak water in front of him was exactly the same as the thousand weak water he imagined, and he confirmed that this was indeed a thousand weak water lakes.

Ye Tian marked this place, and then left here and continued to search for a place with a thousand heavy waters.

If he hit the fourth layer realm of the Tianyuan True Law, he would need to refine a thousand heavy weak water and a thousand heavy water in a short period of time, it was impossible for him to refine a thousand weak water first, and then slowly find the land of a thousand heavy waters, that would undoubtedly be too much of a waste of time, and it would be easy to fail the impact.

It took about half a day, Ye Tian finally found a thousand heavy water small river, although this small river is small, but the water in it is indeed a thousand heavy water, a drop as heavy as Mount Tai.

The two places of the Thousand Heavy Weak Water and the Thousand Heavy Water have been found, and the Immortal Golden Pill is also in his hands, so Ye Tian will basically not have any big problems impacting the fourth layer realm of the Tianyuan True Law.

As a result, Ye Tian prepared to attack the fourth layer realm of the Tianyuan True Law.
